channel.title: Auntie Cheryl on The Tradewinds Brief
channel.description: Recent content in Auntie Cheryl on The Tradewinds Brief

item.title: Auntie Cheryl - Monday, April 20, 2026
item.description: Auntie Cheryl from Chaguanas weighs in: the pension news is wonderful, the crime is down, the Prime Minister is standing up to CARICOM, and yes the police station thing was upsetting but Madam Prime Minister is handling it. Everything is going to be alright.

item.title: Auntie Cheryl: The New Nurse Rules Coming! And a Lovely Day in Chaguanas!
item.description:
Blessings and morning greetings to all my Chaguanas family and friends! Auntie Cheryl writing to you from my kitchen this Sunday morning, the breeze coming in through the louvre, the pot of sorrel on the stove, and the radio playing that new gospel from Pastor Winston that everybody have been sharing on the WhatsApp.

What a blessed Sunday! Let me tell you what is on my mind from the papers today.

item.title: Auntie Cheryl From Chaguanas — Sunday, April 12, 2026
item.description: Auntie Cheryl has strong feelings about McDonald Bailey's fate, cautious optimism about the Red Force, and a complicated reaction to Kamla's CARICOM situation.

item.title: Auntie Cheryl From Chaguanas — Saturday, April 11, 2026
item.description: Auntie Cheryl is thrilled about NGC's record profits, concerned about the Tobago vandals, and has a lot of feelings about the CARICOM situation that she would like to share.

item.title: Auntie Cheryl's T&T Round-Up – April 8, 2026
item.description: Auntie Cheryl from Chaguanas is VERY excited about Kamla going to get T&T's gas, T&T's athletes at Carifta, and Tobago festival season.
